name: Woven Round Seagrass and Palm Leaf Striped Basket - Brightroom™
description:
Add a stylish storage solution to your home with this Woven Round Seagrass and Palm Leaf Striped Basket from Brightroom™. Woven from palm leaf and seagrass, this round striped basket features an open top to make it easy to stash away and remove throw blankets, extra decorative pillows and other items. Plus, it's easy to lift and move from one place to another with the two looped side handles.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
